creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2011-03-13 14:57:27 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    audio/wmmp           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Add new port audio/wmmp:
  
  WMmp is a front-end for the MusicPD.Org player in the form of a Window Maker
  dockapp.
  
  WWW:    http://musicpd.org/WMmp.shtml
  
  PR:             ports/152073
  Submitted by:   Peter Vereshagin <peter at vereshagin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/audio/wmmp/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/audio/wmmp/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/audio/wmmp/pkg-descr (new)
